annotations.purpose: Re-seed dev-mode Vault (auth method + secrets) after any pod restart wipes its in-memory store

command:
set -e

echo "==> Enabling KV v2 at secret/"
vault secrets enable -path=secret kv-v2 || true

echo "==> Seeding sample secrets"
vault kv put secret/prod/database \
  username=appuser \
  password='S3cur3P@ss!' \
  host=db.internal.local

vault kv put secret/prod/api \
  key=ak_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx

echo "==> Enabling Kubernetes auth"
vault auth enable kubernetes || true

vault write auth/kubernetes/config \
  kubernetes_host="https://kubernetes.default.svc.cluster.local:443"

echo "==> Creating ESO policy"
vault policy write eso-read - <<POLICY
path "secret/data/*" {
  capabilities = ["read"]
}
path "secret/metadata/*" {
  capabilities = ["list", "read"]
}
POLICY

echo "==> Creating ESO role"
vault write auth/kubernetes/role/external-secrets \
  bound_service_account_names=external-secrets-sa \
  bound_service_account_namespaces=external-secrets \
  policies=eso-read \
  ttl=1h

echo "==> Vault bootstrap complete"
containers.name: bootstrap
